setup_cmd: touch /app/app/config/local-override.yml && uv venv /opt/venv --quiet && uv pip install --python /opt/venv/bin/python -r requirements.txt --quiet && DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get update -qq && DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y -qq mysql-server mysql-client > /dev/null 2>&1; mysqld --user=mysql --datadir=/var/lib/mysql & sleep 3 && mysql -u root -e "CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS celts; CREATE USER IF NOT EXISTS 'celts_user'@'%' IDENTIFIED BY 'password'; GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES ON *.* TO 'celts_user'@'%'; FLUSH PRIVILEGES;" && cd /app/database && APP_ENV=testing PATH=/opt/venv/bin:$PATH bash migrate_db.sh no-backup && APP_ENV=testing /opt/venv/bin/python base_data.py && APP_ENV=testing /opt/venv/bin/python test_data.py && cd /app
